text:
Market today: The market's got a bit of a mixed vibe; Dow hit a record, but the jobs report was soft. Tech and chips are getting a boost from Nvidia's new revenue-share program for compute power, and AI investments are still hot. 

Your holdings: SOXL is down a painful -28.7% and flagged SELL; that 3X leverage on margin is really biting. QQQI is a TRIM at -1.86% and close to its stop. SPAL is a new, leveraged ETF down -9.58% and will move fast. Remember, margin amplifies all these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on how the market reacts to the Nvidia news, as it directly impacts your chip exposure. Also, watch SMH for potential support around its scanner entry.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged, underperforming positions and be highly selective on new entries.
plays: Your SOXL is down -28.7% and flagged SELL. This leveraged position is bleeding on margin; consider reducing exposure or setting a hard stop below current price to manage risk.
Monitor QQQI closely: It's flagged TRIM and only -1.86% from its stop at 52. Be ready to act if it hits that level.
Watch SMH for a dip: The scanner shows a BUY setup for SMH at 586.43-584.71 with a stop at 580.88. This could be an add-on opportunity if it pulls back.
